reference_goals: Block/head casting topology — bore spacing, water jacket, oil gallery routing
Cranktrain layout — crank journal, rod bearing, piston/pin/ring stack geometry
Valvetrain architecture — cam lobe, rocker/follower, spring pocket, valve guide
Accessory drive — belt/chain path, tensioner, alternator/pump bracket
Gasket interface — MLS head gasket, intake/exhaust manifold flange bolt pattern
Service access — timing cover, oil pan, dipstick boss, drain plug, filter mount
needed_metadata: BOM with material callouts (cast iron vs aluminum block/head)
Assembly torque sequence (head bolts, main caps, rod caps)
needed_engineering_docs: Interface control drawing — block-to-head, block-to-oil-pan gasket surfaces
Thermal boundary conditions — combustion face temps, coolant jacket flow rates
Structural load cases — peak cylinder pressure, bearing loads, bolt preloads
safety_boundary: Cutaway/service-training reference only; no performance tuning recipes or emissions calibration data.
